description_long: This is an ornate, antique chest of drawers elevated on a matching stand with turned legs and decorative stretchers. The upper cabinet features multiple small drawers and a central door, all adorned with intricate floral marquetry and gilded accents. The sides of the chest display large floral inlays, while the front is richly decorated with symmetrical patterns and gold embellishments. The legs and lower structure are also detailed, with carved motifs and gold-painted elements, giving the piece a regal and historic appearance. The wood appears dark and polished, with a glossy finish that highlights the craftsmanship. This chest would be a striking focal point in any urban setting, such as a historical building, museum, or upscale interior.
description: An ornate, antique chest of drawers with intricate floral marquetry, gilded accents, and a matching decorative stand. The piece features multiple drawers, a central door, and richly carved legs.
description_view_0: The front view shows the full array of drawers, the central door, and the elaborate marquetry and gilded details.
description_view_1: The left side view highlights the large floral inlay panel and the depth of the chest, with the decorative legs partially visible.
description_view_2: The rear-angled view reveals the back and underside of the chest, with less visible decoration and more of the supporting structure exposed.
description_view_3: The right side view mirrors the left, showing another large floral inlay and the ornate legwork.
